introSection: African Big Apple is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Pinfari currently located at West Midland Safari Park in Bewdley, Worcestershire, England, UK. It opened in 1987.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride has the Wacky Worm layout. The track passes though a fibreglass apple twice.

fullText:
African Big Apple is a steel kiddie roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Pinfari currently located at West Midland Safari Park in Bewdley, Worcestershire, England, UK. It opened in 1987.

The ride has the Wacky Worm layout. The track passes though a fibreglass apple twice.

Yellow track with green supports.
